title: GCP Cloud Billing current state
description: Normalized current Cloud Billing FinOps snapshot, sourced from the Cloud Billing API GET /v1/billingAccounts/{id} and project billing info. A single current-state file. Read-only.

billingAccountId.description: Billing account id (last path segment of the billing account name).

open.description: Whether the billing account is open/active.

currency.description: ISO-4217 currency code for the account, if known.

amount.description: Current period cost amount, if available.
